creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Why do we package .bak and .orig files?

====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: lib/crystal/openssl/lib_crypto.cr.bak
Error: Missing: lib/crystal/openssl/lib_crypto.cr.orig
Error: Missing: lib/crystal/openssl/lib_ssl.cr.bak
Error: Missing: lib/crystal/openssl/lib_ssl.cr.orig
